get.description:
List all app categories, merged from DB and app registry.

Categories are discovered from:
1. AppCategory documents in DB (admin-managed categories)
2. App manifests in PLUGIN_REGISTRY (auto-discovered from installed apps)

This enables true plug-n-play: when a new app declares a new category,
it automatically appears in the UI without manual registration.

schema.title: Response List Categories Api Catalog Categories Get

post.description: Create a new app category. Requires auth.

schema.title: Response Create Category Api Catalog Categories Post
Response Update Category Api Catalog Categories  Category Id  Patch
Response Delete Category Api Catalog Categories  Category Id  Delete

get.description: List all available apps, marking installed apps for authenticated users.

schema.title: Response List Catalog Api Catalog Get

post.description:
Install an app for the current user.

Uses atomic find_one_and_update with upsert to prevent race conditions
when two concurrent requests try to install the same app.

schema.title: Response Install App Api Catalog Install Post

post.description: Uninstall an app for the current user (soft delete).

schema.title: Response Uninstall App Api Catalog Uninstall Post

get.description: Get all widget preferences for the authenticated user in a given app.

put.description: Batch-update widget preferences using shared utility.

schema.title: Response Update Preferences Api Catalog Preferences  App Id  Put
